the toolbox
← wahyuteguh

resources

Things you can use, not just read — sometimes an ebook, sometimes a small web app, sometimes a video.

take one ↓
web app History of My Life An annual audit of your life. Give each year a theme, log the highs and lows, the lesson it taught you, and rate it — then let an AI find the patterns across your years. web app Moslem Productivity Rhythm Where science meets sunnah — a daily rhythm planner combining ultradian focus cycles, circadian energy, and sunnah time management. Your day starts at Maghrib. web app Pomodoro & Flowmodoro Timer A minimal, distraction-free focus timer. Classic 25/5 pomodoro or flowmodoro — focus as long as you flow, break for a fifth of it. ebook The Shipping Checklist A short, practical ebook: 27 checkpoints I run through before launching anything — from side project to production app.
more soon…
